content_gaps: The SERPs are dominated by large, generic jewelers (Kay, Zales) or listicles with broad, non-jewelry ideas. There's a lack of focus on unique, handcrafted, or artisan-made pieces.
Most pages focus heavily on traditional milestone materials (gold for 1st, silver for 25th) but offer little inspiration for the years in between or for more modern, personal symbols.
There is very little content that delves into the specific symbolism or meaning behind different designs, which is a major angle for a store like Moon Raven Designs.
The concept of a single, meaningful piece is lost. Most results are either category pages with hundreds of items or listicles that include non-jewelry items like experiences or tech gadgets.
